titleStmt.title: SII 11.107: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 107. (B.K. No. 40 of 1929-30). KUṆṬŌJI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WELL NEAR THE ĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of king Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and records a gift of land made by his subordinate Mahāsāhaṇi Ballarasa who was probably of the Noḷamba-Pallava family, to the god Ballēśvara of N[āgira]-bhāvi, at or near Kūṇṭaji (modern Kuṇṭōji, Muddebihal Taluk, Bijapur District).
It is dated Śaka 990, Kīlaka, Āshāḍha, ba. 8, Wednesday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkrānti, which regularly corresponds to A.D. 1068, June 25, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśreyakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
madbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamira . svasti samasta dustarārātirāyakomarasāha
ṇi subhaṭahastimastakanakhāsphāḷanakiśōrakēsari
Aṇnanakēsari Anēkasamaramarddanavijayalabdhalakṣmī
nivāsa vāsu ṇneyara gaṇḍa siṁgi dē
pēsaṇa hanana saṁgrāmadrōhara kṛtānta parataṭṭa taṁtra
pāḷahṛdayasella dvaṁdva seṇasuva sāha
ṇi sarabhabhēruṇḍanuṁ jagadēkavīra girivajradaṇḍaṁ
patihita manōjaṁ brihabāhā
baḷaṁ danaku ra kēḷījanamanōraṁjana
vidviṣṭasāhaṇimā taleyaniriva pisu
ṇa mūgariva śrīmaccāḷukyanoḷaṁba
pallavaṁ pā sudraka nāmādisama
stapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāhaṇi ballarasar .
sakavarṣa 990 neya kīlakasaṁvatsara dāṣāḍha bahuḷa 8
budhavāradandina dakṣiṇāyanasankrānti parvvanimi
ttaṁ kūṁṭajiya ya manneyavalliya sa
magrade lakuṁḍi dhārāpūrvvakammāḍi nā
girabhāviya ballētvaradē bēḍa
ḷḷadiṁ mūḍa
completely damaged
brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsirakavi
legaḷa kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalkaṭṭasi sāsirbbarvvēda
pāragargge � dharmmamanārōrvva naḷidaḍe
vāraṇāsiyaḷaṁ kurukṣētravadoṁsūryyagraha
ṇadoḷ sāsirakavileyuma sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇa
ruma naḷidapātakanakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdarāṁ . saṣṭirvvarṣa sahaśrā
ṇi vriṣṭhvāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
